name: Plasma Caster
description: Plasma Casters are E-tech SMGs that fire slow plasma orbs. They usually hit harder than same-brand standard SMGs, with larger magazines and higher elemental chance, but cost 2 ammo per shot. Best used in short, controlled bursts at close to mid range; most can reach further, except Bandit. Brand traits: Maliwan offers the strongest elemental output; shots create a small splash that can damage nearby targets and apply elements. Hyperion has the best direct damage, large mags and a straighter flight path. Tediore excels with reload throws due to big mags. Dahl has low recoil, high direct damage
notes: Plasma Casters deal 50% bonus splash damage that counts as grenade damage, so gun damage, fire rate and grenade damage boosts all improve them. Bandit Plasma Casters are the exception: their damage does not benefit from grenade damage bonuses.
